name: Red Velvet Cookie || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"An order, like a thunderbolt, rolls over the battlefield.
"OBEY ME, MY BEASTS!" Red Velvet Cookie's order booms out. "FALL IN!" - And the horde of snarling Cake Monsters obediently assume their dreadful battle position. The crimson general personally leads his legion into battle, sowing fear in his enemies with his clenched cake fist and his black eye, blazing with a dark fire only caused by battle fervor.

This battle-hardened warrior will see his mission to its end, utilizing precision and relentlessness.

With every roar of "UNLEASH CHAOS, MY BEASTS!", however, the true softness of his heart peeks through. "But please, come back alive..." tacked in whisper at the end of each command."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

[UPD. 5/24/2025: Example Dialogs used old "dialogue start" marker due to copypasting from another bot that didn't have the updated marker, as seen in most-recent bot. Switched to less token-heavy ver.!]

RED VELVET!! THERE W EG O

uhhb,, Nnnot sure what else to put. Imagine how awkward it must be to meet RV's parents though. "I'd like you to meet my mother" and you're face to face with DE like. Wild. "Here's where I was baked ^^" "babe is this the first oven" "anyways,"
LIKE DOES ANYONE ELSE SEE THE VISION. DOES ANYONE ELSE SEE HOW LOWKEY FUNNY DATING RED VELVET WOULD BE I HOPE SO that's actually one of the bots in my queue right now aw man it wouldve been reaally funny if i saved this for that bot

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
